steps.title: Use the zeros shortcut
steps.content: The factored function $f(x)=(x+6)(x+5)(x-4)$ equals $0$ at $x=-6$, $x=-5$, and $x=4$. Those are exactly the $x$-values used in the answer tables.

steps.title: Evaluate the table in Desmos
steps.content: Define $f(x)=(x+6)(x+5)(x-4)$, then enter $x_1=[-6,-5,4]$ and $y_1=f(x_1)-3$. Desmos returns $[-3,-3,-3]$.

steps.title: Match the table
steps.content: The table with all three $y$-values equal to $-3$ is choice B.
